subjects.description: A pedestrian standing on the curb beside an urban road, wearing a t-shirt with a clearly printed red octagonal stop sign graphic on the chest
subjects.appearance_details: Casual outfit, dark jeans, sneakers; the white-bordered red stop sign with bold white 'STOP' lettering dominates the shirt front
subjects.relationship: The primary obstacle and reason the ego vehicle decelerates and stops
subjects.location: Right-center foreground, on the curb beside the lane
subjects.pose: Standing upright, still, arms relaxed at sides
subjects.action: Standing motionless on the curb, facing the approaching vehicle
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary throughout.
subjects.clothing: Light-colored t-shirt printed with a red stop sign graphic, dark blue jeans, gray sneakers
subjects.expression: Neutral, calm, watching the vehicle approach
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair, dark eyes, clean-shaven, neutral mouth

background_setting: A typical daytime urban street lined with low-rise buildings, parked cars along the right side, sidewalks with curbs, street trees, and traffic signage. The road has clear lane markings, with the ego vehicle's lane stretching ahead. Light traffic and an overall ordinary city atmosphere.

lighting.direction: Front-lit from above and slightly ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft, short shadows cast beneath the pedestrian and parked vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, natural illumination revealing clear road details and the stop sign graphic on the shirt

aesthetics.composition: Centered dashcam-style ego perspective with the road vanishing point ahead and the pedestrian positioned right-of-center on the curb
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted urban grays and asphalt blacks accented by the bright red and white stop sign on the shirt
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings and parked-car rhythm along the curb

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dolly that decelerates to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: The road ahead and the standing pedestrian with the stop sign shirt

context: Autonomous driving scenario demonstrating safe deceleration to a stop for a pedestrian while maintaining lane

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward along its lane on the urban road, approaching the pedestrian standing on the curb.
The vehicle begins decelerating as it nears the pedestrian, staying centered in its lane.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop and remains fully stationary in its lane, with the pedestrian visible ahead on the curb.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white sans-serif letters on a red octagonal sign printed on the pedestrian's shirt
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, right-center of frame, visible throughout the video
text_and_signage_elements.context: Visual cue prompting the ego vehicle to stop

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward in its lane approaching the pedestrian on the curb.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian grows larger in frame as vehicle approaches.
segments.camera: Forward dolly at steady cruising speed.

segments.description: Vehicle decelerates smoothly while maintaining its lane.
Vehicle is fully stopped and stationary in lane, pedestrian standing still ahead.
segments.key_changes: No movement; complete stop held for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves forward along an urban road, the pedestrian with the stop sign shirt visible ahead on the right curb. By 0:02 the vehicle begins to slow as it nears the pedestrian, remaining centered in its lane without drifting toward a parking spot. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop and stays fully stationary through 0:05, with the pedestrian standing motionless on the curb facing the camera.
audio_description: Ambient urban street sounds: distant traffic, faint engine hum gradually quieting as the vehicle decelerates, soft tire rolling on asphalt, and a subtle brake sound as the car comes to rest. No music or speech.
